title: StampHint — First-Use Tooltip for Stamp Buttons
problem: The StampRow buttons show emoji only (🔥⭐❓💡) with no labels for maximum recording-screen clarity. First-time users don't know what each stamp means. A permanent label row would clutter the recording screen; a one-time hint achieves onboarding without ongoing noise.
analysis:
StampHint renders a label row directly beneath the StampRow buttons:
`🔥 Hot  ⭐ Keep  ❓ Unsure  💡 Idea` — text-xs text-secondary, equally spaced.

Behavior:
- On mount: check localStorage for `odio-stamps-hint-shown`
- If NOT set: render the label row, start a 5s auto-dismiss timer
- On first stamp tap (detected via `onStampFired` event from parent) OR on timer expiry: fade out (opacity 0, 300ms), then set `odio-stamps-hint-shown: 1` in localStorage, unmount
- If already set: return null immediately — never shown again

Positioning: absolute, below StampRow, above the record button. Must not push the record button below the thumb zone — z-index overlay, not block-flow.
successCriteria:
- Shown on first visit to Recording Screen only (localStorage flag absent)
- Label row appears beneath stamp buttons with correct emoji-label pairs
- Auto-dismisses after 5s
- Dismisses immediately on first stamp tap
- Sets localStorage flag on dismiss — never shown again on subsequent visits
- Does not shift record button position (absolute positioning, not in normal flow)
- Fade-out animation on dismiss
implementation:
TODO:
1. components/recording/StampHint/StampHint.tsx: reads `odio-stamps-hint-shown` from localStorage on mount. Returns null if set. Otherwise: render label row, setTimeout(5000) → dismiss. Receives `onStampFired` prop from parent — on first call, dismiss early.
2. Recording page passes `onStampFired` callback that also calls StampHint dismiss ref.

decisions.decision: StampHint is a separate component from StampRow
decisions.rationale: StampRow is a pure interaction component — it should not contain any onboarding logic. StampHint is the onboarding layer. Separating them keeps StampRow clean and allows StampHint to be removed or replaced independently.
decisions.recommendation: Recording page renders <StampRow /> and <StampHint /> as siblings. StampHint listens for stamp events via prop callback.

knownLimitations: localStorage is per-browser — hint will show again if user switches to a different browser or device
hint timing is hardcoded to 5s — not configurable
